title: Create: CC Total Logistics
description: Bridge between CC: Tweaked and Create's logistics networks
body:
As of Create 6.0.8, I recommend using the built in Create peripherals instead of using this mod.

---
An addon for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) to allow for more flexible logistics management and automation. Computers can now request packages, track packages, track item amounts, etc., through connected Create logistics systems - just connect the relevant blocks as peripherals. Run your own custom storage systems, terminals, analytics, autocrafters and so on through CC while getting the most out of Create's storage solutions and automation aesthetic in your builds.

Blocks currently supported as peripherals, and the features added on:
- Stock Ticker: Analyze the contents of a network, monitor the capacity and fullness of inventories connected through stock links.
- Frogport & Postbox: Manipulate package addresses and analyze package contents; assign a new address to the block itself.
- Redstone Requester: Fine control over orders for packages.
- Clipboard: Read text and item entries; measure the amount of blocks needed in a materials checklist.

More details for each block on the [reference page](https://xeli-cloud.gitlab.io/website/2025/05/11/cc-logistics-api-0.2.0.html).
